name: ai-devflow-studio
description: Team AI development workflow platform with an Electron developer client.

scripts.test:e2e: corepack pnpm --filter @ai-devflow/desktop dev > /tmp/ai-devflow-vite.log 2>&1 & VITE_PID=$!; for i in $(seq 1 90); do curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:5173 >/dev/null && break; sleep 1; done; PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 playwright test; STATUS=$?; kill $VITE_PID 2>/dev/null || true; exit $STATUS
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm test:e2e && corepack pnpm test:electron-smoke
